title: Tsar Bomba 50 Mt @ 500 m HOB over Gulf of Mexico — B-009 regression
description: User-reported scenario that revealed B-009 (explosion-tsunami HOB gate). Pre-fix produced ~3.5 m wave at trans-Atlantic distance. Post-fix the absolute-HOB gate (CONTACT_WATER_BURST_MAX_HOB_M = 30 m) suppresses the tsunami branch entirely.

blast.hobRegime.comment: scaled-HOB z = 13.6 < 50 → still SURFACE by Glasstone classifier

isContactWaterBurst.comment: absolute-HOB gate (>30 m) blocks the tsunami branch

blast.overpressure5psiRadiusHob.km.comment: Glasstone-Sublette 5 psi at 50 Mt scaled HOB
